description: You are a Facility Safety Manager. Using the '2026 Asbestos Re-inspection Report' located at /home/ga/Desktop/asbestos_report_2026.txt, update the OpenMaint asset registry (admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/) for Building A. Update the status of asset 'HAZ-001' (Vinyl Floor Tiles) in the Lobby to reflect its abatement. Create new asset records for all positive asbestos findings in the Boiler Room and Roof Access as detailed in the report, linking them to their respective rooms. For each room with a confirmed positive finding, append 'WARNING: HAZMAT PRESENT - 2026 SURVEY' to the room's notes or description. Do not create records for materials that tested negative.
